entry.title: Re: Excel connection to SAP failed after GUI 8.00 Update
entry.content:
Perhaps some component was missing during the installation or the ADDON is not active...
https://answers.microsoft.com/en-us/msoffice/forum/all/activating-an-inactive-excel-add-in/a8af5ad0-6c41-4f67-986f-352dd4a23a3f

entry.title: SAC Measure input control doesn't work
entry.content:
Hi SAC Experts,

In a SAC story, I tried to create input control based on the calculated measure. 

This measure appeared in the list of available measures 

but didn't filter the table (I wanted only lines with 1 to be present).

The measure calculation refers to the Date dimension. The Date dimension is set up to show unbooked values, nevertheless, the filter didn't work either with booked dates or unbooked ones. 

In addition, another measure above - Age - is also a calculated measure, but it didn't even appear in the list of available ones for the filter.

Please, could you advise what could be the reason for this and how to make things work?

 

Thank you,

Yuri

entry.title: Re - create bill of exchange presentation
entry.content:
Dear All,

our client issued BoE with Manage automatic payments APP and then made the presentation (BoE Presentation APP) but there was an error and no presentation documents were posted. We went into the batch input session and created documents manually but they are not related to the issued documents.

How can we do for linking boe presentation documents with issued documents?

 

Thanks for any help.

Kind Regards.

Gloria

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Time off replication in H4S4 - available enhancements?

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi community, I´m very happy to be here.

entry.title: Re: What is the preferred way of data fetch from HANA vie...
entry.content: External view would be the easiest option . I do not think creating native SQL is recommended rather use ADBC but why do over-engineering when external views are there.

entry.title: Re: Time off replication in H4S4 - available enhancements?
entry.content:
Hi,

The link you provided is essentially what we currently use, except we are using CPI as the middle ware.

What I am trying to establish is, when we activate H4S4 does that facilitate additional functionality in terms of replicating absences. For example are there any BADIs available.

Regards

Brendan

entry.title: Re: Where is the "follow user" option in the new Community?
entry.content:
Hi I use a workaround for that (via RSS feed, but hopefully the follow function will be brought back soon...):

1. go to users: https://community.sap.com/t5/forums/searchpage/tab/user 

2. search for the user, you would like to follow

3. klick on respective users posts:

4. klick on "Options" -> "subscribe to RSS":

5. use the feed URL for your RSS reader:

entry.title: Lowest SAP ECC version that can be integrated with SAP BTP through Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there a reference webpage that outlines the lowest SAP ECC version that can integrated with SAP BTP through SAP Cloud Connector? I could search the SAP application help page for SAP Cloud Connector, but it only outlines the OS and the CPU that are supported.

My client is on SAP ECC 6.0 EHP6 and wants to integrate with SAP BTP. Is this version supported for integration with BTP?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Where is the "follow user" option in the new Community?

entry.title: LLAMA3 70B programming in ABAP
entry.content:
Hi Community,

At the end of last week, Meta released the long-awaited Large Language Model - LLAMA3. What is unusual about it? The fact that it's open source and really delivers. For now we got the 8B and 70B versions, but 400B is also in the preparation. In my opinion, this is a big deal. And how is it doing in SAP's backyard? I won't reveal - see for yourself.

entry.title: Re: How to Create Application Job in SAP ABAP Cloud ?
entry.content:
Hello, 

please use appropriate SAP Managed Tags - such as "ABAP Development and "ABAP RESTful application programming model" - when creating questions or blog posts. 

You may have a look at this blog post by Andre Fischer:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-schedule-application-jobs-from-a-rap-based-business-object/ba-p/13553507 

Kind regards,
Carine

entry.title: Curriculum Status direct link
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

We would like to understand if it is possible to generate a direct link to address the Users directly into the Curriculum Status screen. 

Under the Direct Links tool, we can see that it's possible to have direct links for several purposes (Learning History, Registrations, Learning Assignments,..) however we couldn't find a way to generate a direct link for the Users "Curriculum Status" screen. 

Is this something that it's possible to generate? 
 
Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: Does having many replication flows increase compute/s...

Tuncay

entry.title: Sales Organizational Structure - Ad Service Industry
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a question about the Sales Organizational Structure for Service industry.

Customer is an Ad service company who reach customers via Instagram, Facebook. Also, they say have 500+ dispensaries. They couldn't understand the SAP terms how more specific we explain.

Could somebody give examples how this Sales Organizational Structure works for a Ad service company?

How to explain them to make this understand.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: List with 9 SAP S/4 HANA Fiori Apps for Analysis and Reports | SALES (SD)
entry.content:
@Uday1 Below is the answer I got for my question about reports.

It is recommended to create custom reports based on cds views.

Kindly check if cds views below could fulfill your requirements:

I_SalesDocItemPricingElement (https://api.sap.com/cdsviews/I_SALESDOCITEMPRICINGELEMENT)

I_InventoryPriceByKeyDate(https://api.sap.com/cdsviews/I_INVENTORYPRICEBYKEYDATE)

Also cds views for Sales for your reference:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/87fae757dc3bf032e1000000...

Hope it helps!

Thanks!

That has me stumped.  I can see that it's an array.

entry.title: Re: Derive Week Range based on Date (SAC Model)

entry.title: Re: CAP authentication
entry.content:
Technically speaking, CAP typically relies on approuter/xsuaa instances to oversee authentication. That's maybe most common but that's not an absolute. 

Assuming that your CAP application deployment is front-ended by approuter, you should have a look at this post by Marius Obert,  I haven't used this in a while, but I expect the mechanism still works. Marius writes up an important caveat on the technique -- it will not work universally -- so read carefully.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel and SAP Datasphere connection
entry.content:
Hi @alexander_peter,

Thanks for the heads up regarding #SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel.

Is there any other official announcements and documentation for this info?

Do you mean now if customers connect SAP Datasphere tenant directly with SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel then it requires the BI subscription for the end user though it's included SAC license already?  It's little bit confusing between Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud.

Appreciate more clarification.

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Revision level on products- different per plant ?
entry.content:
We have a need to have different revision levels for a product on plant level. How can we do that?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Revision level on products- different per plant ?
entry.content:
The revision level for a product is it not available at plant level . 

 

Please follow the KBA 2963059 ( https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2963059 ) and submit a feature request if you would like it added

entry.title: Is it possible to change the Comm. User ID?
entry.content:
Hi SAP support team,

Is it possible to rechange the CC ID in "Maintain communication user"?

 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to change the Comm. User ID?
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

 

The Communication User ID is created automatically by the system and it's not modifiable.

The same happens for Business Users ID, for example, this information is unique for each user and cannot be edited.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: how to do GI in the Q stock from the upper lever WBS...
entry.content:
You need to transfer the material from one WBS stock segment to another with a 415Q movement type.

It's a transfer posting in MIGO.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere and SAP Data Intelligence Cloud - what does this mean for me now?
entry.content: The blog contains links to the official SAP Notes regarding end of life for DI Cloud and DI on-prem. Regarding new capabilities, the roadmap explorer, also linked in the blog is the official source for any coming plans. There are a lot of capabilities coming to the solution over the coming quarters so please continue to monitor the roadmap over this time.

entry.title: WebIDE After building, code changes revert
entry.content:
I'm facing a strange issue where I'm making a small change to my Component.js file, but once I build the code is reverted back to what it was before. I've never seen this before so I've tried logging in/out, opening webIDE in incognito and clearing cache to no avail. 

Can anyone please help me on this? The code keeps reverting right after the build is completed, even when attempting to deploy.

entry.title: Select query date feild in not working
entry.content: I given greater than equal to condition in select query but still its fetching old records

entry.title: Re: Function Module for converting lower case to upper case
entry.content: thank you

entry.title: Re: Send SAPscript form PDF from output type message to Business Network
entry.content:
We are running into an issue with this BADI logic above.  We are finding that the NAST record has not been created at the point of this BADI executing.  Does anybody know what we may have done incorrectly?

Much appreciated...

entry.title: Re: WebIDE After building, code changes revert
entry.content: I found the solution. I copied the code, deleted the file I was trying to change, made a new file with the same name and put the code back in. After this, the build completed without reverting my code.

entry.title: ECTR Macro PARAMETER_MAP search for Empty
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible to search for an empty / not filled value in a class in ECTR macro?

My idea was: 

p_classification = PARAMETER_MAP("Class1@Classtype1")
p_classification.CONFIGURATION_TYPE = ""

search1 = SEARCH("doc", p, p_classification)
resultlist1 = KEYLIST_FROM_SET(search1)


But I get all documents back and not only the ones without an entry.

I hope someone allready had this problem and can help.

entry.title: Re: Message_Type_X error when using BAPI
entry.content: There is a message sent along with the MESSAGE_TYPE_X. Check the SAP notes or contact SAP support.

entry.title: SAP IAS - Password Synchronisation with Active Directory
entry.content:
Hello all,
Is it possible to sync passwords between IAS and Active Directory? 
I have a scenario under which users can authenticate using the SPNEGO mechanism: however, in case the kerberos token is not available, they should be able to log-in via Username and Password, using the same password that they use to authenticate via AD.

I was not able to find anything in the documentation that reflects a similar scenario.

Any hint?
Best,
Roberto.

entry.title: Re: SAC Measure input control doesn't work
entry.content:
@ypinchuk 

If you go with measure based filter you might not able to plan in the table. Instead of measure based filter, try creating a measure based dimension using the measure values to create dimension category. Make sure you cover all possible values for the measure including null. Then you can use this dimension to filter the table.

Nikhil

entry.title: Please share the list of Business Processes in SAP PP.
entry.content: Please share the list of Business Processes in SAP PP.

entry.title: Re: Transformation issue in SAC Data Model
entry.content:
@bosingh 

Not sure what was the workflow used. But once you created the the transformation and the job, you should just edit the job and replace data source and select the new file, your transformation should remain intact.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: PAN number field is missing in Business Partner API S...
entry.content:
Hi Rajesh,

The PAN number is not currently available in the OData API for BP, you could use the.  If you would like to suggest this an a feature request on the SAP Customer influence portal please follow the steps in KBA 2838330 - How To Request for New Features for Master Data topics in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. 

Kind Regards,
Stephen

My name is Yashobanta Satapathy. I have been working as an Assistant Professor in Production Engineering field for 7 years after completing masters in production engineering. I'm eager to explore new opportunities as an SAP Functional Consultant mainly into SAP modules like Production Planning, IBP. I have completed beginners learning journey for SAP S/4 HANA Manufacturing for public cloud. I'm eagerly looking forward for certification opportunity to enhance my skills and explore jobs in SAP. Thanks

Please let me know if you have any idea or workaround for this.

entry.title: Re: Announcing General Availability of SAP Build Code: Speed up development with generative AI
entry.content: Till when will be the service free in trial plan?

entry.title: Re: SAC Measure input control doesn't work
entry.content: Nikhil, it's analytic table, not planning. I created a measure based dimension but it doesn't work with unbooked date members

entry.title: Re: Badi hitting twice...SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_C for Dispute Management ECC 6.0
entry.content:
I was having the same issue.

  1. BADI Implementation UDM_BEFORE_VALID_S of Definition SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_S is calling the customer implementation of Definition SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_C.  Refer to class method IF_EX_SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_S~CHANGE to see that call.
  2. The customer implementation of SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_C is then called directly on its own as you would expect.

That is how my system works for Package UDM_CASE in Software Component FSCM_CCD Release 618 SP14.

entry.title: Re: How to use aggregated value of a Z Condition Type aut...
entry.content:
Hi Abul,

Do you want to have a field amount (kbetr/ConditionRateRatio) for ZPM0 as not zero in the order? If I can see it correctly, you are already using an own Custom Logic implementation. Try to use a statement like ConditionRateValue = ConditionAmount in this implementation.

Thank you.

Kind Regards,
Iza

entry.title: Re: CAP authentication
entry.content:
In most of cases all deployed applications to SAP BTP is behind authorization. By default public access is restricted.  There are some work around if you really want to do it without authorization

Anyway could you specify the Postman method? Are you trying to reach local one or the deployed version of service/application router? If it is local I think you can try to use .http file to test your requests. you can set authorization with {{me}} Example

If you are trying to reach a deployed app/service on SAP BTP you will need to create a service key and authenticate by using OAuth 2.0. After creating the service key on SAP BTP cockpit you can read this documentation and get your Bearer token  https://learning.postman.com/docs/sending-requests/authorization/oauth-20/

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content: Hi @julieplummer20 , thanks for sharing the great news! Kindly consider posting such news with an ABAP related tag like https://community.sap.com/t5/c-khhcw49343/ABAP+Development/pd-p/833755570260738661924709785639136. I actually missed this totally on SCN and only learned of it from social network 🙂

entry.title: SAP Support for suppliers on Ariba
entry.content: Hi! I'd like to know how can suppliers on Ariba request support from SAP. Is there any steps I can follow?

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: 95b37bbfb78cfe8359129bada7e2668b625984bec104a8cbfc372d79b7289163

entry.title: Re: SAP Support for suppliers on Ariba
entry.content:
Hi Ruisa! Thanks for sharing your question. As a supplier on Ariba, the companies can request assistance over the phone or e-mail.  They just need to follow the steps described below.

  • Access supplier.ariba.com
  • Click on the “?” icon, at the top right corner
  • Select “Support”
  • Select “Contact us”
  • Select “Register on SAP Business Network”
  • Select “Something else”
  • Select any of the options
  • Select “Create a Case”
  • Fill the form to request assistance by phone or email.

You can also check the steps described above on the blog post with screenshots or YouTube video Supplier Launchpad: Introducing the New Help Centre - YouTube.

If you need any further guidance, the Customer Interaction Center is also available 24/7 to guide customers through this process. You can find their contact information according to your country here: SAP Support Worldwide Telephone Directory.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2023
entry.content:
Hi @graziela / Team,

We have employees in WV in Hardy county and this county is not added in the table T5UTZ. As per the new regulations, we need to display County in the quarterly files. Not sure if BSI is planning to add the county or not. Any suggestions to handle this situation would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: How to use aggregated value of a Z Condition Type aut...

entry.title: Systemcopy sap QAS longTime
entry.content: Hello everyone, I'm performing the homogeneous system copy of my SAP QAS SQL Server 2019 on Windows Server 2019 using SAPINS. I exported it, and it took approximately 72 hours. Now I'm in the process of importing it to another server, and it has been 6 days, but it hasn't finished yet. Is there anything in this process that can be done faster?

entry.title: Is it possible to restrict which Business Role is assignable to a Business User?
entry.content:
Hello Dear SAP,

 

With the administrator role I can assign business roles to the business users. For all business users to all business roles.

I would like to create a subadmin business role. For example a Purchaser Administrator. The Purchaser administrator can only assign the business roles that are related to purchasing. Is that even possible? How would I handle this?

I decided to restrict a copied version of the administrator role to achiev this. I restricted the businessroles with a assigned bussines group. Therefore in the value help it should only display the purchase business roles(according to the bussines group). But the restriction simply doesnt work! it doesnt has any effect of restriction. This seems like a software bug to me.

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Scheduled Report shows successful status; but Mail server never Receives... Where's the problem?
entry.content:
System Overview:

Using SAP Business Objects 4.3 SP3

We recently switched to using a mail forwarding service SendGrid which has a 20mg limit on SMTP emails.  For the most part this has worked fine but there are a few schedules which have reports generated greater than 20mg in size.  Such schedules are failing to make it to their recipient; yet the schedule shows success.  It appears this is a hard limit within SendGrid that we can't configure.  I wouldn't mind but I would have expected the BO schedule to report failed; instead the schedule returns success!  Why?

I found KBA 1778797 Email recipient does not receive report but the instance status is "Success"

This KBA indicates because the relay/mail server "accepted responsibility for delivery of the message" BOBJ's responsibility has ended; thus job status is success. 

 

However, SendGrid testing using telnet shows it's not accepting responsibility.  it immediately returns an error:  "Mailbox unavailable.  The server response was: error reading data, max message size exceeded."  

I'm confident there's a gap here I'm missing but I'm not technical enough to see it. 

Could it be that SendGrid receives the email message.  sends an Acknowledgement back to BOBJ which BOBJ interprets as "I got it" and BOBJ moves on?  But then SendGrid does a process sees it violates rules and sends a message back which BOBJ ignores? 

To prove this out I created two reports one which is under 20mg (barely) one over 20mg (23).  These reports run daily.  I always receive the one less than 20mg.  The 23mg one has yet to get to me.  Both show status "Success"

When I use telnet to connect to the mail relay and generate a message to send, it returns an error message indicating the message is not accepted by the Mail server because it's too big.  I don't get any other acknowledgement..  So to me there's only one message from SendGrid... I reject your mail... so why does BOBJ show success? 

Does KBA 1778797 apply here? Do I need to open a ticket with SAP for investigation or is this a influence request to better handle errors/warnings from the mail servers when sending messages?   This appears to be a GAP in the process of handling email destinations I wasn't expecting to encounter.

Note: I have no access to our Server logs (they are administrated by a 3rd party) I have no access to mail server or relay (they are administrated by a different group).

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to restrict which Business Role is **bleep**...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

 

Unfortunately, it's not possible to restrict which Business Roles an user is authorized to assign to others. 

If the user has authorization to assign Business Users to Business Roles, he will be able to assign all the Business Roles available... 

 

However, I have tried to find any alternative to provide to you and there's a functionality that might be something similar.

This functionality is the Maintain Business User Groups and Maintain Businsess Role Groups.

With Maintain Business User Groups app you can create business user groups and assign multiple business users to them. This helps you to organize your area and easily search for all business users of a certain category (for example to assign them to business roles). Grouping also facilitates maintenance of authorizations. If you are the super administrator for all areas, you can delegate this task to administrators for the relevant areas, such as Financials. In this case, you would create a business user group for Financials.

With Maintain Business Roles Groups app you can create business role groups and assign multiple business roles to them. This helps you to organize your area and easily search for all business roles of a certain category (for example to assign business users to them). Grouping also facilitates maintenance of authorizations. If you are the super administrator for all areas, you can delegate this task to administrators for the relevant areas, such as Financials. In this case, you would create a business role group for Financials and allow to assign these business roles only to particular user groups. 

 

For more information, you can check the following documentations:

SAP Blog Post | How to use the Maintain Business User Groups functionality

SAP Blog Post | How to use the Maintain Business Role Groups functionality

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Fiori App F1564
entry.content: Hi Dominik, sorry but both links are working for me, I tried different browsers. They work. Please share the screenshot of what you see. But basically you can simply search yourself on the help portal for "Attachments of Bank Statements"

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman
entry.content:
Good evening Dylan @dylan-drummond  

Thx for your investigation and tests. Meanwhile I can confirm, that the new 2022 image is also running with utm/ubuntu and docker. I've the feeling that Podman is a bit faster, but never mind. 

Also there is an interesting thread on docker rosetta support, which is quite specific about the issues regarding Rosetta2. Anyway maybe it is worth trying a test with docker native and qemu in the current version. https://github.com/docker/roadmap/issues/384

Will give an update. Bests Tom

entry.title: How to configure employee search result in global header
entry.content:
Current Employee Search in Global Header is described in Sap Documentation in the prism of employee search criteria 

unfortunately there is SAP Notes that describes Employee Search Result format.

we have other information that personal informations ( name, preferred name, etc) to display so what is the way to proceed ?

entry.title: Re: How to use aggregated value of a Z Condition Type aut...
entry.content:
Hi Iza,

Do you want to have a field amount (kbetr/ConditionRateRatio) for ZPM0 as not zero in the order?

I would say that not for all sales order. Statement is true only for when ZPR1 value found in the header. ZPR1 value will found for promotional sales order. 

Thanks 
Abul Hasnat

entry.title: Re: Select query date feild in not working
entry.content:
Hi dear college,

Try to use a GROUP BY in your code. It may solve the problem.

best regards,

Julio C.

entry.title: Re: WebEx VLS integration with SF LMS for2H 2023 release
entry.content: @SFSS99 : Please try to enable SSO for both Webex and SuccessFactors.

entry.title: Role Lists in "latest Role-Based Permissions"
entry.content:
Hi - With the "latest Role-Based Permissions" screen, we are no longer able to navigate to see the roles.  You can only see what's on page 1 or do a search.  In the legacy role-based permissions screen we would see "items per page" and an arrow allowing us to go to the next page.

Was the removal of the "Next Page" intentional?

Thanks,

Rich

entry.title: Display All Steps in Role Assignments
entry.content:
As per PLU-8126 "Display All Steps in Role Assignments", I should have the ability to maintain the role by "scrolling down, clicking Next, or choosing the steps in the anchor bar".  However I only have the ability to choose the next step in the anchor bar.  The note says it should be working by default, but it is not.

Thanks,

Rich

entry.title: Re: Manage Task Fiori Features - App F3091
entry.content:
Hi Prashant, thanks for answering.

I'm getting same issue with all my incidents, even when i try to create a task using another fiori app like "Task Management".

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I am Divyashree Bobba . I identify myself as women, I have 9 plus years of experience in SAP ABAP development environment . This is a wonderful Initiative for women. This certification would help me upgrade my skills and be better at what I do. This would be a great Opportunity.

Thanks you for the consideration. Looking forward to hearing back from you.

Thanks and Regards,

Divyashree Bobba

Thanks and best regards

Dilan

entry.title: Re: Lowest SAP ECC version that can be integrated with SA...
entry.content:
Hello @ahales-2019 

please check:

https://help.sap.com/doc/92c0b171cceb4db2a93518b34b84febd/Cloud/en-US/connectivity_service.pdf

https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/connectivity

We have ECC EHP 7 and a Fiori 2.0 Gateway connected via rfc/http - but there can be limitations depending on use case.

 

Hope that helps

entry.title: Re: Workflow Flexible not going to My Inbox until SWU_OBUF
entry.content: Glad it is resolved. Thanks for sharing how you've resolved it.

entry.title: Re: Implementation of Barcode/QR Scanner in SAPUI5
entry.content: sap.ndc.BarcodeScannerButton  open the camera in local run on BAS  , but don't open it in after deploy to SAP Build Work Zone.

entry.title: Re: Problem with Drag and Drop in Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi,

When you record a drag and drop in Producer, it creates a message bubble that explains what must be dragged and where it should be dropped.  Is that message bubble appearing?  Can you modify the instructions in that message bubble to make it clear what the user is to do?

Regards
Shane
